name: cc-enslaver
description: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.13 adds the rule-09 rolling-patch frequency layer: PreToolUse(Edit|Write) now physically DENYs the 4th small edit to the same file in one session unless a systematic rewrite (≥ 50 lines / ≥ 1500 chars) has reset the counter — closing the last major v0.11 escape route from soft Stop-layer-only enforcement to hard PreToolUse interception.
